task.title: [SHELL] Zsh como shell padrão com plugins e configuração inicial

todos.description: Create configs/zsh/.zshrc with Zinit plugin manager setup, plugins (zsh-autosuggestions, zsh-syntax-highlighting, fzf integration with Ctrl+R/Ctrl+T, zsh-completions), Starship prompt init with pastel-powerline preset, and dev aliases (g=git, lg=lazygit, k=kubectl, d=docker, ag=agnostic)
todos.note: Created .zshrc with Zinit, plugins (zsh-autosuggestions, zsh-syntax-highlighting, zsh-completions), fzf bindings, Starship pastel-powerline, and aliases.

todos.description: Create configs/zsh/.zshenv with environment variables (ZDOTDIR, HISTFILE, HISTSIZE, SAVEHIST, EDITOR, etc.)
todos.note: Created minimal .zshenv with ZDOTDIR, history vars, and EDITOR=nvim.

todos.description: Update agnostic.yaml.example — add zsh and starship to base packages (fzf already in extra); keep shell: /bin/zsh as is
todos.note: Added zsh and starship to packages.base in agnostic.yaml.example.

todos.description: Update internal/bootstrap/rootfs.go — add step to configure Zsh as default shell in rootfs (write /etc/shells entry and/or set shell for root user in /etc/passwd during bootstrap)
todos.note: Added configureDefaultShell() called from BootstrapAll as Step 10. Checks /bin/zsh, writes /etc/shells, and updates /etc/passwd for root.

todos.description: Verify go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./... -race all pass
todos.note: Run the Go build/verification pipeline to ensure no compilation errors or test failures.
